section.heading: Transfer or conveyance of concession contracts or leasehold surrender interests

subsection.heading: Approval of Secretary.—
subsection.content: No concession contract or leasehold surrender interest may be transferred, assigned, sold, or otherwise conveyed or pledged by a concessioner without prior written notification to, and approval by, the Secretary.

subsection.heading: Conditions.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary shall approve a transfer or conveyance described in subsection (a) unless the Secretary finds that—

paragraph.content: the individual, corporation, or other entity seeking to acquire a concession contract is not qualified or able to satisfy the terms and conditions of the concession contract;

paragraph.chapeau: the transfer or conveyance would have an adverse impact on—

subparagraph.content: the protection, conservation, or preservation of the resources of the System unit; or
the provision of necessary and appropriate facilities and services to visitors at reasonable rates and charges; and

paragraph.chapeau: the terms of the transfer or conveyance are likely, directly or indirectly, to—

subparagraph.content: reduce the concessioner’s opportunity for a reasonable profit over the remaining term of the concession contract;
adversely affect the quality of facilities and services provided by the concessioner; or
result in a need for increased rates and charges to the public to maintain the quality of the facilities and services.

subsection.heading: Modification or Renegotiation of Terms.—
subsection.content: The terms and conditions of any concession contract under this section shall not be subject to modification or open to renegotiation by the Secretary because of a transfer or conveyance described in subsection (a) unless the transfer or conveyance would have an adverse impact as described in subsection (b)(2).

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;

width:94.0pt ; max-width:94.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-left:1px solid black;

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: In subsection (b)(1), the word “other” is added for consistency in the subchapter. See section 101926 of the revised title.
